message:
audit: batch 479 — 9 files (~11,877 lines) all SOUND, 4 never-audited files cleared

First-ever audits:
- unix/split.rs (712L): combined waker, split-half lifecycle correct
- virtual_time_wheel.rs (631L): deterministic min-heap with lazy cancel
- cancellation_protocol.rs (1578L): oracle phase checks correct
- quic_native/connection.rs (1386L): QUIC state machine verified

Re-audits:
- virtual_tcp.rs (876L, 135 indicators): simulation semantics correct
- select.rs (984L): alternating fairness, drain-aware variant
- tcp/stream.rs (1474L, 91 indicators): connection state correct
- instrumented_future.rs (1716L): measurement correct
- progress_certificate.rs (2520L): Azuma/Freedman/Ville bounds verified

combinator/rate_limit+quorum+pipeline agent still running.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
